Senior React Frontend Developer

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior React Frontend Developer to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining our customer-facing web application used by over 100,000 users daily.

Required Qualifications
- 5+ years of professional experience in frontend development
- Expert-level proficiency in React and TypeScript
- Strong experience with state management (Redux, Zustand, or Context API)
- Experience building responsive, accessible web applications
- Proficiency in modern CSS (Tailwind CSS, CSS Modules, or Styled Components)
- Experience with REST APIs and GraphQL
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
- Strong communication and collaboration skills

Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with Next.js or similar React framework
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP)
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
- Knowledge of performance optimization techniques (code splitting, lazy loading)
- Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress)
- Full-stack experience with Node.js or Python

Responsibilities
- Lead the development of new features for our React-based web application
- Collaborate with UX designers to translate mockups into pixel-perfect implementations
- Mentor junior developers through code reviews and pair programming
- Optimize application performance and user experience
- Contribute to architectural decisions and technical strategy

We offer competitive salary, remote-first culture, and opportunities for growth. If you are passionate about building great user experiences, we'd love to hear from you.
